metadata.name: kaos-agent-skills
metadata.description: Official agent skills for the KAOS Agentic Operating System — AI-powered Kubernetes infrastructure management on KubeCore.

plugins.name: kaos-prd-skills
plugins.description: Full KAOS PRD lifecycle — create, start, advance, track progress, capture decisions, and complete Product Requirements Documents for KAOS platform features.

plugins.name: kaos-prd-create
plugins.description: Create a new KAOS PRD from a feature idea or design conversation.

plugins.name: kaos-prd-start
plugins.description: Begin active implementation on a validated KAOS PRD — validates readiness, checks platform state, creates feature branch.

plugins.name: kaos-prd-next
plugins.description: Identify the single highest-priority task to work on for a KAOS PRD — checks platform prerequisites and designs implementation approach.

plugins.name: kaos-prd-update-progress
plugins.description: Record completed work and verify acceptance criteria for a KAOS PRD — updates AC, threat, and question statuses.

plugins.name: kaos-prd-update-decisions
plugins.description: Capture design decisions made during KAOS PRD implementation — validates against kaos:schema and keeps PRD as source of truth.

plugins.name: kaos-prd-complete
plugins.description: Finalise a completed or close an abandoned KAOS PRD — archives the file, updates and closes the GitHub issue.
